new_symbols: ContentStore.Append (engine/catalog/content.go, added after Read, before writeContentFile)
reference_docs: docs/LLD/split.md (threshold default ~8KB/~2000 tokens, split scaffold-only status)
for_verify_agent.note_on_task_index: Per repo precedent (1.4.1 commit e52ce53, 1.4.2 commit 3982e48), task.jsonl entries for a subtask are added at the verification/close-out step, not the implementation commit -- only file.jsonl was updated here. Verify agent should add the task-1.4.3 entry (state 'verified'/'PASS...' etc.) to .cdr/index/task.jsonl as part of its close-out commit, consistent with task-1.4.1/1.4.2's history.
